headline: Does Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Blending Healthcare Expertise With a Measured Dividend Raise Reveal Its Strategic Priorities?
summary: Colgate-Palmolive recently appointed Christopher S. Boerner, Ph.D., Chair and CEO of Bristol Myers Squibb, to its Board of Directors and modestly lifted its quarterly dividend to US$0.53 per share, effective in the second quarter of 2026. This combination of fresh healthcare-focused board expertise and a measured dividend increase highlights how Colgate-Palmolive is adjusting both governance and capital return priorities. Next, we will examine how adding Christopher Boerner to the board may...
